title: Fix admin panel URL routing and visibility issues

requirements.text: Fix the TanStack Router configuration in frontend/src/App.tsx to ensure the /admin route properly matches when users navigate to the URL https://studyneeds-c05.caffeine.xyz/#caffeineAdminToken=ce5861fcab1733db191f53acf1238a5fd5d097aabfd6c254c5de695de99ec00c/admin - the route must handle the hash-based routing with the caffeineAdminToken query parameter and correctly load the AdminDashboardPage without showing 'your search did not match any documents' error

quotes: maine ish url ko search kiyalikh rha h your search did not match any documents

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to the full URL with /admin path successfully loads the AdminDashboardPage
The 'search does not match any documents' error no longer appears
The route handles the caffeineAdminToken query parameter correctly without breaking routing

requirements.text: Ensure the Admin Panel navigation link in the Header component (frontend/src/components/Header.tsx) is visible for authenticated admin users in both draft and production deployments - the link should appear in the header navigation area and be clickable

quotes: draft k header m bhi admin pannel nhi dikh rha h

acceptanceCriteria: Admin Panel link is visible in the header for users with admin role
The link is properly styled and integrated into the header layout
Clicking the link navigates to /admin successfully

requirements.text: Verify the AdminRoute protection component (frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx) correctly handles authentication and authorization checks while allowing the route to match properly - ensure it does not interfere with TanStack Router's path matching logic
acceptanceCriteria: AdminRoute properly wraps the admin dashboard route without breaking routing
Authentication and admin role checks work correctly
Non-admin users see the unauthorized message as expected

requirements.text: Test the complete admin panel access flow end-to-end: authenticate as an admin user using the caffeineAdminToken, navigate to /admin via direct URL and via the header link, verify the AdminDashboardPage loads successfully with all tabs (Products, Orders, Users) accessible, and confirm no routing errors occur
acceptanceCriteria: Admin authentication works with the provided caffeineAdminToken
Direct URL navigation to /admin loads the dashboard
Header link navigation to /admin loads the dashboard
All three admin tabs (Products, Orders, Users) are accessible and functional

constraints: Do not modify the Internet Identity authentication flow or useInternetIdentity hook
Do not change the backend access control logic
Preserve the existing TanStack Router setup while fixing the /admin route
Do not break existing routes or navigation functionality
nonGoals: Adding new admin features or capabilities
